title: IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners:
IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners!
